description: You are an Earth Science teacher designing a climate change module on the OLPC laptop. Using the Mauna Loa CO2 annual mean data (1979-2019) located at /home/ga/Documents/co2_data.csv, create an educational HTML report. The report must include the average CO2 levels for the 1980s, 1990s, 2000s, and 2010s, as well as the year with the largest year-over-year increase. Save the processing script to /home/ga/Documents/analyze_co2.py and the resulting report to /home/ga/Documents/co2_report.html. Finally, ensure the report is saved to the Sugar Journal with the entry name 'Mauna Loa CO2 Report'.
